summary: Completed testing of Customer Feedback (BAC-F6-16) feature. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin page working with stats cards, Create/View/Review modals, and PDF download. Public feedback page working with star ratings, 6 categories, 13 questions, and score calculation.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <tbody>/<select> - non-critical development warning (same as previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: Evaluation thresholds correct: >=90% Excellent, 75-89% Good, 60-74% Average, <60% Unsatisfactory
N/A ratings properly excluded from score calculation
13 default questions across 6 categories (BAC Office, Audit Preparation, Punctuality, Audit, Ethics, Effectiveness)
Public endpoint properly blocks duplicate submissions
Fixed SelectItem empty value issue in Create modal (changed '' to 'none')
seed_data_creation: Existing feedback record with 90.8% score (Excellent) - 'Test Manufacturing Co.' - confirmed working
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Feedback (BAC-F6-16) feature fully tested. Key workflow: Admin creates feedback form -> Public link generated -> Client submits ratings (1-5 stars) -> System calculates score -> Admin reviews. Existing test data shows 90.8% score = Excellent evaluation.

endpoints_verified.GET /api/customer-feedback: WORKING - Lists all feedback forms with optional status filter
endpoints_verified.POST /api/customer-feedback: WORKING - Creates feedback form with 13 default questions, returns access_token
endpoints_verified.GET /api/customer-feedback/{id}: WORKING - Returns feedback with questions array
endpoints_verified.PUT /api/customer-feedback/{id}: WORKING - Updates feedback, recalculates score if questions changed
endpoints_verified.POST /api/customer-feedback/{id}/review: WORKING - Marks as reviewed with reviewer info
endpoints_verified.GET /api/public/feedback/{access_token}: WORKING - Public form access (no auth), returns pending status check
endpoints_verified.POST /api/public/feedback/{access_token}: WORKING - Submits ratings, calculates score, blocks duplicate

frontend_verified.Admin Page Load: WORKING - Stats cards (Total, Pending, Submitted, Reviewed, Avg Score)
frontend_verified.Create Modal: WORKING - Certificate dropdown, org name, audit type, standards checkboxes, public link info
frontend_verified.View Modal: WORKING - Shows score percentage, evaluation badge, all 13 question ratings with stars
frontend_verified.Review Modal: WORKING - Reviewer name, date, comments fields
frontend_verified.PDF Download: WORKING - Downloads PDF for submitted feedback
frontend_verified.Copy Link: WORKING - Copies public URL for pending feedback
frontend_verified.Public Feedback Page: WORKING - Header with org info, rating scale legend, 6 category sections, star rating interaction, want same team radio, suggestions textarea, respondent info, submit button

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
